# Trigonometry for height calculation

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry for height calculation: Trigonometry can be used to find the height of an object (flagstaff) given the angles of elevation to its top and bottom from a point on the ground. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
